perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a yellow baseball jersey and a yellow cap with a pink 'Reverse Index' arrow on top introduces himself at a baseball stadium. (2) He is joined by another man in the same jersey, and they interact excitedly, gesturing towards the field. (3) They hold up signs and boxes of food branded with a pink food delivery logo. (4) The men are seen at a food pickup counter in a hallway, then back in the stadium seats eating various foods including snacks and fruit. (5) One man puts on a blindfold while holding a food container for a taste test. (6) They display a pink and white panda plush toy wearing a miniature team jersey. (7) The first man speaks directly to the camera, pointing to text overlays explaining app features.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop-rock music starts immediately with an energetic male voice introducing the scene. (2) A second male voice joins, shouting enthusiastically in a professional sports-commentary style. (3) The soundscape is filled with overlapping fast-paced dialogue, loud laughter, and constant background music. (4) Ambient crowd noise from the stadium is audible underneath the main dialogue throughout the clip. (5) The music stays consistent in energy with occasional sound effects like dings and swooshes marking transitions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '大家好我是今天的這個 主播嘎哥' - Intro text, enthusiastic tone. (2) '熱血主播徐展元' - Introducing the guest, energetic tone. (3) 'foodpanda 外帶自取下單 免排隊還享79折' - Promotional functional text explaining the service. (4) '美食助攻兄弟' - Decorative hook text showing a discount code. (5) '外帶自取79折! 買票進來點都划算!' - Promotional text emphasizing value.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product/Service demonstration at stadium -> Eating and reaction -> Call to action with discount code.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main creators, multiple spectators in the stadium background and passers-by in the pickup area.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two adult males wearing yellow 'Brothers' baseball jerseys. One wears a yellow cap with a distinctive pink arrow accessory.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The stands of a large baseball stadium filled with spectators, and a brightly lit indoor food service corridor with pickup signs.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight mixed with stadium artificial lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Problem -> Solution -> Benefit -> Social Proof -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-energy promotional piece for foodpanda's self-pickup service at CTBC Brothers baseball games. It aims to inform fans that they can avoid long lines and get discounts by using the app, demonstrated through the lively interaction between popular influencer Cai Aga and famous sports anchor Xu Zhanyuan.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Directly promoting the app features, showing the brand logo throughout, and providing a specific discount code for viewers.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Cai Aga's signature 'Reverse Index' arrow hat and Xu Zhanyuan's professional shouting commentary style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively leverages local sports culture and a well-known celebrity anchor to build credibility for the delivery brand's specific service in a niche environment.
